title: carex rotundata var. compacta
intro: Carex rotundata var. compacta, also known as the Round-leaved Sedge, is a compact, low-growing perennial plant in the sedge family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Carex rotundata var. compacta include the potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas or infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
